rationale: Both papers focus on online consumer search on retail platforms (the citing paper models sequential search and filtering on Amazon-like platforms, while the cited paper maps Amazon co-view search behavior). The cited study provides empirical structure about how consumers search products and consideration sets, which could plausibly be a mechanism/foundational input for the citing paper’s search assumptions. With only a DOI match and no in-text context, this is not clearly an incidental mention, so it should be retained for full judgment.
